description: Merge the calendar events 'Product Strategy Review' and 'Engineering Architecture Discussion' into a single new event titled 'Product & Engineering Joint Review'. The new event should be scheduled for the same date as the 'Product Strategy Review' from 10:00 to 12:00 at the 'Product Lab'. Include the description 'Combined session covering product strategy and engineering architecture alignment.' and add all unique attendees from the original meetings (Alice Johnson, David Chen, Emma Thompson, and Luis Fernandez). Delete the two original events after creating the new one.
